body:
@Haroenv Hi, the example that you provided, still resets everything(both search input and filters).

it syncs the url on the search page, but when you click on the hit, and go back it goes to base url:
1. type amazon in the search input
2. url becomes **https://ehsvqo.sse.codesandbox.io/?query=amazon&page=1**
3. click on the hit
4. click back
5. url is **https://ehsvqo.sse.codesandbox.io** instead of **https://ehsvqo.sse.codesandbox.io/?query=amazon&page=1**
